title: Repurposed Structures - Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks Compat
description: Add Priest Houses to RS Villages!
body:
Add this datapack to the game to add compatibility between Repurposed Structures and Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks. You will find the new Priest Houses in RS Overworld Villages!


- Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks mod can be obtained from here: [https://modrinth.com/mod/irons-spells-n-spellbooks](https://modrinth.com/mod/irons-spells-n-spellbooks)

- Repurposed Structures mod can be obtained from here: https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures-forge

**NOTE: As of 1.21, Iron's Spells n Spellbook mod has this compat built directly into their mod! No datapack needed anymore.**

![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2qHcm09P/images/18935455dea4f7e1ae9066d65147be97acf12b20.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2qHcm09P/images/18935455dea4f7e1ae9066d65147be97acf12b20.png)

**Note:** for people using CurseForge Launcher to download datapacks, use mods like Global Data & Resourcespacks to automatically load in downloaded datapacks without needing to manually move the datapacks from the resourcepack folder to the correct folders. 
https://modrinth.com/mod/globalpacks
